Method.Name: Task<Ok<PaginatedItems<CatalogItem>>> CatalogApi.GetAllItems(PaginationRequest paginationRequest, CatalogServices services, string? name, int? type, int? brand)

Task<Ok<PaginatedItems<CatalogItem>>> CatalogApi.GetItemsByBrandId(PaginationRequest paginationRequest, CatalogServices services, int? brandId)
